Configuration for code style settings, including indentation, line endings, and character encoding.

# Purpose
The `.editorconfig` file defines coding style rules for the project. It specifies that the root configuration is true, meaning this is the top-level configuration file. For all files, it sets the indentation style to spaces with a size of 4, enforces a final newline, trims trailing whitespace, uses LF for line endings, sets the character set to UTF-8, and limits the maximum line length to 88 characters. For files with extensions such as `css`, `html`, `js`, `json`, `jsx`, `scss`, `ts`, `tsx`, `yaml`, and `yml`, the indentation size is set to 2 spaces.
